field_contract.hypothesis_statement: Public-safe proposed explanation stated without private domain details.
field_contract.baseline_explanations: Known explanation classes the hypothesis must differ from.
field_contract.novelty_delta: Specific difference introduced by this hypothesis.
field_contract.testable_difference: Observable or measurable consequence that separates the hypothesis from baselines.
field_contract.acceptance_criteria: Conditions required before the hypothesis may advance to mechanism modeling.

public_safety_rule: Packets must not include personal, household, health, animal-care, financial, location, credential, relationship, or raw transcript details.
promotion_rule: A hypothesis advances only when novelty_delta and testable_difference are both non-empty and not semantically identical to baseline_explanations.
